description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/auth_config.json to set jwt.algorithm to 'RS256' instead of 'none'. check_jwt.py then finds a real signing algorithm and exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_jwt.py: jwt.algorithm is 'none', which accepts unsigned/forged tokens. Setting it to a real signing algorithm, RS256. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_jwt.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
